implementation_validation: PASS required before handoff: 545 regression cases, 43 NP cases, 1,156 standardized construction assertions, 170 note/test alignment, the 30-case RUL survey-readiness runtime map, panel workflow, promotion and release gates, documentation links, and repository verification.
linguistic_confidence: No construction status changed. PFV and RUL remain research_pending. RUL has five checked sources and a completed source/runtime contrast map, but zero clean promotion-grade item coverage and no new survey instrument.
overclaim_review_scope: Re-read the RUL runtime at main.js:7963-8252 against Wong 2023, Cheung 2018, Chor 2018, the existing public claim, and 30 implementation-only probes. The release describes the node as a candidate analysis and does not treat parser output, pilot volume, or generated probes as linguistic proof.
unresolved_release_questions: The RUL label still competes with an instrumental-SVC analysis and broader purposive-lai analyses.
No clean role-neutral panel instrument has been created or piloted.
The next blocking input is the user's prompt to guide survey creation.
The reported 50 live RUL responses remain outside the canonical 23-response snapshot.
